description: Phase 5K autonomy tier ladder. For Phase 5K the active tier is effectively tier 1 or lower. Even if config says higher, code edits remain blocked in this phase. Phase 5L (Delegated AI Approval Council) will add the delegation that lets higher tiers proceed safely overnight.

tiers.name: read_only
tiers.description: Read-only health checks, status snapshots, no writes outside generated reports.

tiers.name: reports_and_memory_refresh
tiers.description: Regenerate gitignored reports + curated memory artifacts (file map, memory index, scorecard, brief).

tiers.name: proposal_only
tiers.description: Build proposals, task graphs, and upgrade-gate evaluations. No execution.

tiers.name: sandbox_preview_with_approval
tiers.description: Run a sandbox simulation of a proposed change. Requires Phase 5L Delegated AI Approval Council quorum + operator approval before any apply step.

tiers.name: limited_low_risk_auto_edit_future_disabled
tiers.description: Future tier — limited low-risk additive edits with full council quorum + change ledger + rollback. Disabled in Phase 5K.

tiers.name: emergency_repair_future_disabled
tiers.description: Future tier — emergency repair only with stricter council quorum + Serge as a required reviewer. Disabled in Phase 5K.
